description_es: Haz un INNER JOIN entre users.csv y orders.csv usando user_id como clave.
description_en: Perform an INNER JOIN between users.csv and orders.csv using user_id as key.
hints_es: JOIN relacion1 BY campo, relacion2 BY campo
hints_en: JOIN relation1 BY field, relation2 BY field

description_es: Haz join de users y orders, luego proyecta solo name, product y quantity.
description_en: Join users and orders, then project only name, product and quantity.
hints_es: Usa tabla::campo para desambiguar después de JOIN
hints_en: Use table::field to disambiguate after JOIN

description_es: Haz un LEFT OUTER JOIN de users con orders para incluir usuarios sin órdenes.
description_en: Perform a LEFT OUTER JOIN of users with orders to include users without orders.
hints_es: JOIN tabla1 BY campo LEFT OUTER, tabla2 BY campo
hints_en: JOIN table1 BY field LEFT OUTER, table2 BY field

description_es: Join products.csv con orders.csv usando product_name/product como clave.
description_en: Join products.csv with orders.csv using product_name/product as key.
hints_es: Las claves de join deben coincidir en valor
hints_en: Join keys must match in value

description_es: Agrupa users.csv por país y cuenta cuántos usuarios hay en cada país.
description_en: Group users.csv by country and count how many users in each country.
hints_es: GROUP relacion BY campo, luego COUNT(relacion)
hints_en: GROUP relation BY field, then COUNT(relation)

title_es: Suma total de ventas por región
description_es: Agrupa sales.csv por región y suma el amount total.
description_en: Group sales.csv by region and sum the total amount.
hints_es: SUM(bag.campo) suma valores de un campo
hints_en: SUM(bag.field) sums values of a field

description_es: Agrupa users.csv por país y calcula la edad promedio.
description_en: Group users.csv by country and calculate average age.
hints_en: AVG(bag.field) calculates average

description_es: Agrupa sales.csv por región y encuentra el amount mínimo y máximo.
description_en: Group sales.csv by region and find minimum and maximum amount.
hints_es: MIN() y MAX() encuentran valores extremos
hints_en: MIN() and MAX() find extreme values

description_es: Carga users.csv y convierte todos los nombres a mayúsculas usando UPPER().
description_en: Load users.csv and convert all names to uppercase using UPPER().
hints_en: UPPER(field) converts to uppercase

description_es: Carga users.csv y crea un campo 'full_info' concatenando name y country con ' - '.
description_en: Load users.csv and create a 'full_info' field by concatenating name and country with ' - '.
hints_en: CONCAT(str1, str2, ...) joins strings

description_es: Carga sales.csv y redondea los valores de amount usando ROUND().
description_en: Load sales.csv and round amount values using ROUND().
hints_es: ROUND(numero) redondea al entero más cercano
hints_en: ROUND(number) rounds to nearest integer

title_es: Dividir usuarios por edad con SPLIT
title_en: Split users by age with SPLIT
description_es: Usa SPLIT para dividir users.csv en young (age < 30) y old (age >= 30).
description_en: Use SPLIT to divide users.csv into young (age < 30) and old (age >= 30).
hints_es: SPLIT relacion INTO r1 IF cond1, r2 IF cond2
hints_en: SPLIT relation INTO r1 IF cond1, r2 IF cond2

description_es: Carga users.csv dos veces, filtra por diferentes países y une con UNION.
description_en: Load users.csv twice, filter by different countries and combine with UNION.
hints_en: UNION relation1, relation2 combines tuples

title_es: Query completa: Top productos por revenue
title_en: Complete query: Top products by revenue
description_es: Agrupa orders.csv por producto, calcula revenue (quantity * price), ordena DESC y toma top 5.
description_en: Group orders.csv by product, calculate revenue (quantity * price), sort DESC and take top 5.
hints_es: Combina GROUP, SUM, ORDER y LIMIT
hints_en: Combine GROUP, SUM, ORDER and LIMIT

Útil para comparar conjuntos de datos

Syntax: COGROUP rel1 BY col1, rel2 BY col2
Useful for comparing datasets

description_es: JOIN optimizado con tabla pequeña replicada.
Asigna ranks a usuarios por edad.
Genera subtotales por país y edad.
Extrae primeras 3 letras del nombre.
